title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out with Special Week...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Over there! It's a claw machine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Special Week is pointing
and see a claw machine filled with Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, wow! You know you're out of the
sticks when you find merchandise like this!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
How nice... I bet my mom would be happy if I sent
her one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's eyes are sparkling brighter than
diamonds...
choice_data_list: Do you want me to win you one?
Do you want me to win you one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
